zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev John Barker於1462年出生在英國斯塔福爾利費爾德時，他的父親Thomas Barker De Calverhall42歲，母親Frances Harding42歲。他與Margaret Fifteenth MM Coleclough結婚。他去世於1531年在英國史洛普爾可拉維利享年69歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾可拉維利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev John Barker于1462年出生在英国斯塔福爾利費爾德时，他的父亲Thomas Barker De Calverhall42岁，母亲Frances Harding42岁。他与Margaret Fifteenth MM Coleclough结婚。他去世于1531年在英国史洛普爾可拉維利享年69岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾可拉維利。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Rev John Barker was born in 1462, in Lichfield, Staffordshire, England, his father, Thomas Barker De Calverhall, was 42 and his mother, Frances Harding, was 42. He married Margaret Fifteenth MM Coleclough. He died in 1531, in Claverley, Shropshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Claverley, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev John Barker est né en 1462, à Lichfield, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Barker De Calverhall, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Frances Harding, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fifteenth MM Coleclough. Il est décédé en 1531, à Claverley, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Claverley, Shropshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Rev John Barkerが1462年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアリチフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Barker De Calverhallは42歳，母Frances Hardingは42歳であった。Margaret Fifteenth MM Colecloughと結婚した。彼は1531年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアクラバーリーで69歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアクラバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rev John Barker(이)가 1462년 영국 스태퍼드실르 리ch필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Barker De Calverhall(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances Harding(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Margaret Fifteenth MM Coleclough(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1531년 영국 슈럽실르 클레이벌리에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 클레이벌리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev John Barker родился в 1462 г. в местности личфиелд, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Barker De Calverhall было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Frances Harding, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fifteenth MM Coleclough. Он умер в 1531 г. в местности клавирли, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности клавирли, шропшир, Англия.
